title: angelonia tomentosa
intro: Angelonia tomentosa, also known as Mexican Angelonia or White Angelonia, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America, characterized by its showy white, pink, or purple flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Angelonia tomentosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
